item.title: Generac Stock Rallies: Why AI Matters More Than Earnings
item.description: Generac shares rose to new highs as investors focused on the company's strategic role in powering the artificial intelligence and data center sectors.

item.title: Cisco Systems Below $82? Buy Now, It Won’t Last—$182 Is Coming
item.description: Cisco Systems is on track to double in price and could rise by a modest triple-digit amount in time, tracking with other DotCom-era names driven by AI...

item.title: Amazon Bets Big on BETA: Why Analysts See 50% Upside
item.description: Strategic investment from Amazon and a strong cash position signal major upside for BETA Technologies as it approaches critical commercial milestones.

item.title: NANO Nuclear Energy: Short-Squeeze or Rapid Meltdown Ahead
item.description: NANO Nuclear Energy advances its commercialization timeline and derisks its revenue outlook, setting itself up for a short squeeze.

item.title: McDonald’s Serves Up Double-Sized Tailwind for Growth
item.description: McDonald's dividend and buybacks are reliable for 2026, and buyback activity may increase, given the strength of Q4 numbers and what they imply for 20...
